shots.title: Home — composer & hero
shots.description: Centered chat-first shell. The composer is the entry point for every feature; slash commands open cards or canvases without leaving home.
shots.validation: tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts — boots without uncaught errors; composer + hero render.
